wine_restaurants.name: El Celler de l'Aspic
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer de la Miralda 31, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Catalan seasonal tasting menus with deep DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant wine pairings; the regional wine-and-food anchor in Falset
wine_restaurants.description: Falset's landmark wine-focused restaurant, Michelin Bib Gourmand-listed; sommelier-led Priorat pairings alongside seasonal Catalan tasting menus.

wine_restaurants.name: Quinoa Bar Restaurant
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer de la Font 4, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Market-driven Mediterranean dishes with a wine list anchored in DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant; popular with winemakers after harvest
wine_restaurants.description: Falset wine bar and kitchen with a market-led Mediterranean menu and a straightforward Priorat and Montsant list.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Hostal Sport
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer Miquel Barcelo 6, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Classic Catalan cuisine with a cellar assembled over 95 years; anchors on DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant with some international references
wine_restaurants.description: The dining room of the historic 1928 Hostal Sport in Falset; a century-deep Priorat cellar and Catalan cuisine make it the town's wine-dining institution.

wine_restaurants.name: Ca la Marina
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer Nou 8, 43374 La Vilella Alta, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Countryside cellar restaurant in a 17th-century stone house; traditional Catalan menu paired with estate Priorat from La Vilella Alta producers
wine_restaurants.description: Converted 17th-century stone farmhouse in La Vilella Alta offering long rural lunches with a tasting menu paired to estate DOQ Priorat.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Brichs
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer de la Font 8, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Catalan cuisine with a serious regional wine list; weekly menu built on Priorat and Montsant pairings by the owners
wine_restaurants.description: Family-run Falset restaurant with a traditional Catalan kitchen and an owner-curated Priorat wine list; a reliable lunch anchor for wine-route visitors.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Val Llach
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Estate dining room at Celler Val Llach serving traditional Catalan dishes matched to the bodega's Carinena and Garnacha Priorat portfolio
wine_restaurants.description: The dining room attached to Celler Val Llach in Porrera; estate tasting menus paired to Val Llach Embruix and top-tier Porrera Priorat.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Lo Celler
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Simple Catalan daily menu with a short but focused list of Gratallops-area DOQ Priorat by the glass and bottle
wine_restaurants.description: Village restaurant in Gratallops serving the working-lunch set menu preferred by local producers; Gratallops producer wines by the glass.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Cartoixa d'Escaladei
wine_restaurants.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Catalan cuisine adjacent to the Cartoixa ruins; Scala Dei wines served by the glass as the natural pairing at this historic site
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant at the Escaladei hamlet next to the 12th-century Cartoixa ruins; Catalan cuisine with Scala Dei Priorat pours in a historically resonant setting.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

wine_restaurants.name: La Masia del Priorat
wine_restaurants.address: Cami del Mas 4, 43376 Poboleda, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Rural Catalan masia restaurant outside Poboleda serving seasonal menus built around local products; wine list focuses on Poboleda and neighbouring DOQ estates
wine_restaurants.description: Farmhouse-restaurant outside Poboleda with a seasonal Catalan menu; an intimate wine-pairing experience in the DOQ Priorat countryside.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Verema
wine_restaurants.address: Carrer de Sant Roc 6, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Seasonal Catalan restaurant in Porrera taking its name from the harvest; wine list drawn entirely from Porrera-zone DOQ Priorat producers
wine_restaurants.description: Named after the Catalan word for harvest, Verema in Porrera pairs simple seasonal Catalan dishes with a village-producer DOQ Priorat list.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Cooperativa Falset Marca
wine_restaurants.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Cooperative dining room inside the 1919 Martinell wine-cathedral building; cooperative Etim wines feature prominently alongside Catalan cooking
wine_restaurants.description: The dining room inside Falset's Martinell cooperative building; cooperative Etim Priorat and Montsant wines paired with traditional Catalan cooking in an architectural landmark.

wine_restaurants.name: Mas Martinet Estate Lunch
wine_restaurants.address: Carretera Falset-Gratallops km 5, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Producer estate lunch at Mas Martinet; seasonal Catalan dishes paired with Clos Martinet and Camino range wines by the winemaker team
wine_restaurants.description: Periodic estate lunch sessions at Mas Martinet on the Falset-Gratallops road; Clos Martinet pairings over a Catalan working lunch with the producer team.
